data.body: HANDOFF (2026-07-08): OPEN, NO plan-review yet -> run rebar review-plan eca4 BEFORE claiming. Added by the 2026-07-08 audit. Convert _engine/rebar_reconciler path-based _load()/_loader (spec_from_file_location) to normal package imports across ~40 modules. Large mechanical refactor; do LAST (it touches every reconciler module and will conflict with any in-flight reconciler change — land C2/B1/D1/9622 first).
